kaos_elements.name: Safety Goal
kaos_elements.description: Safety objective for RollCall: Students must be able to view their own attendance records
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Quality-attribute specific requirement analysis

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 1
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 2
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): The system must generate attendance reports for administrators and calculate attendance percentages
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 3
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): The system must support multiple classes and semesters, and maintain historical attendance data
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for risk mitigation

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 4
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): A roll call system must track student attendance for classes
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 5
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

kaos_elements.name: Safety Requirement 6
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for risk mitigation

steps.analysis_text: The current roll call system requirements for student attendance tracking have been reviewed for safety and efficiency. Both safety and efficiency elements are aligned in their goals, emphasizing the need for student visibility of attendance records and the generation of reports for administrators. However, there may be overlaps in the requirements that need to be clarified to prevent redundancy and ensure both safety and efficiency are adequately addressed. The validation statuses for all elements remain pending, indicating the need for further review and refinement.

steps.analysis_text: The current requirements for the RollCall system encompass both sustainability and trustworthiness objectives. The focus elements aim to ensure that the system can maintain historical attendance data while supporting multiple classes and semesters. Meanwhile, the reviewer elements emphasize the need for security, auditability, and integrity in tracking attendance. Overall, the objectives are aligned, with no immediate conflicts identified between the sustainability and trustworthiness requirements. However, further validation and refinement may be needed to ensure comprehensive coverage of all aspects, particularly in the areas of security and environmental impact.
steps.analysis: The current requirements for the RollCall system encompass both sustainability and trustworthiness objectives. The focus elements aim to ensure that the system can maintain historical attendance data while supporting multiple classes and semesters. Meanwhile, the reviewer elements emphasize the need for security, auditability, and integrity in tracking attendance. Overall, the objectives are aligned, with no immediate conflicts identified between the sustainability and trustworthiness requirements. However, further validation and refinement may be needed to ensure comprehensive coverage of all aspects, particularly in the areas of security and environmental impact.
steps.feedback: The requirements are well-structured, but it would be beneficial to clarify how sustainability and trustworthiness will be measured and maintained throughout the system's lifecycle. Consider developing specific metrics for each requirement to facilitate future assessments.

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Goal
kaos_elements.description: Responsibility objective for RollCall: The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Quality-attribute specific requirement analysis

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 1
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure teachers can mark attendance accurately for accountability and transparency.
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for regulatory accountability

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 2
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure students can view their attendance records to promote transparency.
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for stakeholder transparency

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 3
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): The system must generate attendance reports for administrators and calculate attendance percentages
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for ethical compliance

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 4
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): The system must support multiple classes and semesters, and maintain historical attendance data
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for regulatory accountability

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 5
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (stakeholder transparency): A roll call system must track student attendance for classes
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for stakeholder transparency

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 6
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for ethical compliance

kaos_elements.name: Responsibility Requirement 7
kaos_elements.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
kaos_elements.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for regulatory accountability

steps.analysis_text: The roll call system's requirements for tracking student attendance align with the responsibilities and safety goals outlined. However, potential overlaps and redundancies exist in responsibility and safety requirements regarding student record access and attendance marking by teachers. This may lead to conflicts in implementation priorities.
steps.analysis: The roll call system's requirements for tracking student attendance align with the responsibilities and safety goals outlined. However, potential overlaps and redundancies exist in responsibility and safety requirements regarding student record access and attendance marking by teachers. This may lead to conflicts in implementation priorities.
steps.feedback: The requirements appear comprehensive, but clarity in the delineation of roles and responsibilities for teachers and students regarding attendance tracking may enhance the system's functionality. Consider consolidating overlapping requirements to streamline development.
